improvement_goals: ONLY assess the Issue #740 diff (b9f9d21d). Apply ONLY safe, high-value, low-risk improvements. If nothing clearly improves quality, report no-change.

Assess: makeAutoYesToggleHandler(paneCli) is invoked inside renderSplitPane on each render, producing a fresh closure. Determine if this is a real regression (note: renderSplitPane already creates inline arrows like onCliToolChange each render, so TerminalSplitPaneContent's memo was already not preserved across parent re-renders). Only memoize if it is clearly worth it AND does not complicate the code.
Verify naming/comments are clear and the new props JSDoc is accurate.
Do NOT expand scope: no useAutoYes refactor, no non-active-split server sync, no AutoYesToggle redesign.
constraints: All existing tests must remain green.
npx tsc --noEmit / npm run lint / npm run test:unit must pass after any change.
If you make changes, keep them minimal and commit-ready.
Strongly prefer NOT changing behavior — this is a focused bug fix already verified by acceptance test.
